query:
INSERT INTO places (id, name, slug, type, description, atollId, latitude, longitude, code) VALUES
-- International Airports
(200001, 'Velana International Airport', 'velana-international-airport', 'airport', 'Main international gateway to the Maldives, located on Hulhulé Island near Malé. Serves as the primary entry point for most international visitors.', 1, 4.1917, 73.5294, 'MLE'),
(200002, 'Gan International Airport', 'gan-international-airport', 'airport', 'Main gateway to southern Maldives, located on Gan Island in Addu Atoll. Serves Addu City and surrounding atolls.', 27, -0.6933, 73.1556, 'GAN'),
(200003, 'Hanimaadhoo International Airport', 'hanimaadhoo-international-airport', 'airport', 'Gateway to northern Maldives, located in Haa Dhaalu Atoll. Serves as alternative entry point for northern atoll visitors.', 28, 6.7442, 73.1703, 'HAQ'),
(200004, 'Maafaru International Airport', 'maafaru-international-airport', 'airport', 'International airport serving Noonu Atoll in the north. Gateway to luxury resorts in the northern atolls.', 18, 5.8222, 73.4747, 'NMF'),
(200005, 'Villa International Airport Maamigili', 'villa-international-airport-maamigili', 'airport', 'Private international airport serving Alif Dhaal Atoll. Primarily used for resort transfers.', 2, 3.4708, 72.8361, 'VAM'),
-- Domestic Airports
(200006, 'Dharavandhoo Airport', 'dharavandhoo-airport', 'airport', 'Domestic airport in Baa Atoll serving local islands and inter-island connectivity.', 5, 5.1558, 73.1328, 'DRV'),
(200007, 'Fuvahmulah Airport', 'fuvahmulah-airport', 'airport', 'Domestic airport serving Fuvahmulah Island in Gnaviyani Atoll.', 25, -0.3092, 73.4339, 'FVM'),
(200008, 'Maavarulu Airport', 'maavarulu-airport', 'airport', 'Domestic airport in Gaafu Dhaalu Atoll serving southern atolls.', 26, 0.3367, 73.5114, 'RUL'),
(200009, 'Ifuru Airport', 'ifuru-airport', 'airport', 'Domestic airport serving Ifuru Island in Raa/Noonu region.', 18, 5.7081, 73.0250, 'IFU'),
(200010, 'Kaadedhdhoo Airport', 'kaadedhdhoo-airport', 'airport', 'Domestic airport in Gaafu Dhaalu Atoll serving southern region.', 26, 0.4881, 72.9969, 'KDM'),
(200011, 'Kadhdhoo Airport', 'kadhdhoo-airport', 'airport', 'Domestic airport serving Laamu Atoll in the south.', 24, 1.8592, 73.5219, 'KDO'),
(200012, 'Kooddoo Airport', 'kooddoo-airport', 'airport', 'Domestic airport in Gaafu Alifu Atoll serving southern atolls.', 23, 0.7342, 73.4328, 'GKK'),
(200013, 'Dhaalu Airport', 'dhaalu-airport', 'airport', 'Domestic airport serving Dhaalu Atoll in central Maldives.', 20, 2.6667, 72.8944, 'DDD'),
(200014, 'Thimarafushi Airport', 'thimarafushi-airport', 'airport', 'Domestic airport in Thaa Atoll serving central region.', 19, 2.2103, 73.1514, 'TMF'),
(200015, 'Kulhudhuffushi Airport', 'kulhudhuffushi-airport', 'airport', 'Domestic airport in Haa Dhaalu Atoll serving northern region.', 28, 6.6311, 73.0667, 'HDK'),
(200016, 'Madivaru Airport', 'madivaru-airport', 'airport', 'Domestic airport in Lhaviyani Atoll serving central-north region.', 12, 5.4575, 73.3703, 'LMV'),
(200017, 'Funadhoo Airport', 'funadhoo-airport', 'airport', 'Domestic airport in Shaviyani Atoll serving northern region.', 11, 6.1611, 73.2872, 'FND'),
(200018, 'Hoarafushi Airport', 'hoarafushi-airport', 'airport', 'Domestic airport in Haa Alifu Atoll serving far northern region.', 29, 6.9806, 72.8958, 'HRF'),
(200019, 'Faresmaathodaa Airport', 'faresmaathodaa-airport', 'airport', 'Domestic airport in Gaafu Dhaalu Atoll serving southern region.', 26, 0.1929, 73.1958, 'FMT');
command:
